Emily Johnson
Columbus, OH

Summary
Dedicated customer service representative with over 5 years of experience in retail and food service industries. Proven ability to communicate effectively with customers and provide exceptional service. Currently seeking to leverage strong interpersonal skills in a new role, though lacking specific transportation industry experience.

Walmart, Columbus, OH  
June 2020 - Present

- Resolved customer complaints and ensured satisfaction through effective communication.

Starbucks, Columbus, OH  
May 2018 - May 2020

- Maintained a clean and organized work environment.
